reason: Heavy Metal: adult animated anthology with surreal, dark fantasy
Akira: dystopian cyberpunk animation far from child’s fare
Pink Floyd - The Wall: trippy, concept-driven animation for adults
Princess Bride: stylized fantasy sequences with mature themes
Evil Dead II: horror-infused animation sequences for grownups
Aliens: blend of live-action and animated effects with dark tone
Faster Pussycat! Kill! Kill!: bold adult stylization in live scenes
Grand Day Out: Aardman’s scratchy stop-motion for all ages
Close Shave: Wallace & Gromit’s edgy humor in stop-motion form
Antonia’s Line: animated ant sequences bridge for mature reflection
